InputOrScenario: Send logs from firewall, server, IDS, and application sources.
ExpectedOutput: Logs appear in the SIEM dashboard and are searchable.
PassCriteria: All four source types are visible and searchable.

InputOrScenario: Replay an event that matches the brute-force rule.
ExpectedOutput: A security alert is generated with severity, timestamp, and IP.
PassCriteria: Alert is visible on the alerts page and dashboard counters update.

InputOrScenario: Simulate event throughput close to the licensed EPS limit.
ExpectedOutput: The system remains responsive and does not crash.
PassCriteria: Dashboard remains usable and alert rendering stays within acceptable delay.

InputOrScenario: Replay attack traffic under nominal operating load.
ExpectedOutput: Alert is generated quickly enough for SOC use.

InputOrScenario: Viewer account attempts to modify correlation rules.
Single firewall log line is passed to the parser.
ExpectedOutput: Timestamp, source, severity, and IP are parsed correctly.
PassCriteria: Parser output matches the expected structured event.

InputOrScenario: SQL injection payload is passed to the rule function.
PassCriteria: Detection logic returns TRUE for the malicious payload.

InputOrScenario: Triggered event is passed to the alert formatter.
ExpectedOutput: Alert contains rule name, severity, timestamp, and source IP.
PassCriteria: Formatted alert matches the expected analyst-facing structure.

InputOrScenario: Replay recorded SYN flood traffic into IDS/SIEM ingestion.
ExpectedOutput: System creates alert with attack description and source IP.
PassCriteria: Alert appears within 5 seconds and includes the attacker IP.

InputOrScenario: Replay attack traffic through the full ingestion and correlation pipeline.
ExpectedOutput: Logs move from source to SIEM, rule match, alert, and dashboard without loss.
PassCriteria: The full pipeline completes and the alert is visible to the analyst.

InputOrScenario: Replay firewall, IDS, and application logs tied to one attack chain.
ExpectedOutput: Related evidence is grouped into a single incident.
PassCriteria: Analyst sees linked context across sources.

InputOrScenario: Execute end-to-end SOC workflow from ingestion to analyst resolution.
ExpectedOutput: Logs, alerting, acknowledgement, incident grouping, and resolution all work.

InputOrScenario: Security analyst validates a realistic attack scenario.
ExpectedOutput: Analyst can review alert, source IP, severity, and case details.
PassCriteria: Analyst confirms the system is usable for triage.
